data.name: ApiRootStatus
data.value: API service is running. Navigate to /weatherforecast to see sample data.

data.name: AuthUsernamePasswordRequired
data.value: Username and password are required.

data.name: RequestBodyRequired
data.value: Request body is required.

data.name: NameValidation
data.value: Name is required and must be 120 characters or fewer.

data.name: EmailValidation
data.value: A valid email is required (256 characters or fewer).

data.name: OrganizationValidation
data.value: Organization must be 200 characters or fewer.

data.name: MessageValidation
data.value: Message must be between 10 and 4000 characters.

data.name: FieldRequiredMax
data.value: {0} is required and must be {1} characters or fewer.

data.name: LinksValidation
data.value: Links must include valid absolute URLs for LinkedIn, Optomatica, and Racemate.

data.name: ValueOutcomesValidation
data.value: ValueOutcomes must contain between 1 and 20 items.

data.name: FocusAreasValidation
data.value: FocusAreas must contain between 1 and 20 items.

data.name: CurrentRolesValidation
data.value: CurrentRoles must contain between 1 and 20 items.

data.name: HighlightBulletsValidation
data.value: HighlightBullets must contain between 1 and 50 items.

data.name: SelectedExperienceValidation
data.value: SelectedExperience must contain between 1 and 50 items.

data.name: SkillsValidation
data.value: Skills must contain between 1 and 100 items.

data.name: WeatherFreezing
data.value: Freezing

data.name: WeatherBracing
data.value: Bracing

data.name: WeatherChilly
data.value: Chilly

data.name: WeatherCool
data.value: Cool

data.name: WeatherMild
data.value: Mild

data.name: WeatherWarm
data.value: Warm

data.name: WeatherBalmy
data.value: Balmy

data.name: WeatherHot
data.value: Hot

data.name: WeatherSweltering
data.value: Sweltering

data.name: WeatherScorching
data.value: Scorching
